accessDenied.body: You are signed in but your account does not have admin permissions or is not linked to an operator profile. Contact an administrator to be granted access.
accessDenied.title: No admin access

errors.generic: We could not sign you in. Please try again.
errors.cancelled: Sign-in was cancelled. You can try again at any time.
errors.unavailable: The sign-in service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.configuration: Sign-in is not enabled on this environment. Try again later or contact an administrator.

login.wrongCredentials: Keycloak rejected this username or password for the current realm. Try your username or verified email; if it still fails, open Keycloak Admin Console to confirm the user is enabled and reset the password.
login.errorAuthMethodNotAllowed: The server has not enabled password sign-in for the admin portal.
login.errorClientMisconfigured: The admin sign-in client does not match the server configuration.
login.errorLoginFailed: We could not reach the sign-in server, or the request was rejected.
login.errorInvalidScope: The admin sign-in scope is misconfigured.
login.validationError: Please enter both your username and password.
login.hint: Your admin session is stored in an HttpOnly cookie; access is still verified by server-side RBAC.
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage content, users, and operations.
login.title: Welcome back
login.authDisabledHint: Admin sign-in is not configured on this server. Set the sign-in environment variables (issuer and client) in `.env` and restart the app.

navItems.iamDescription: Identity & access: roles, permissions, admin users, and role grants (RBAC v15).

scaffold.modulePurposeIntro: Admin module; no fake production metrics. This screen will connect to the APIs listed in the spec when implemented.

overview.contentQueueDesc: Check the editorial queue and content status.
overview.importErrorsDesc: No import jobs have reported errors on this dashboard.
overview.subtitle: Monitor product health, learners, content, and systems in one place.
overview.title: Operations center

library.title: Media library
library.subtitle: Manage media assets (image/audio/video) for cards, avatars, and learning content. All metadata changes and deletions are audited.

content.empty: Data count is zero. Check seed data/import or canonical tables.
content.examplesNote: Example sentence counts here reflect total records in the repository. Edit or import details using the Import or partial data flow.
content.subtitle: Subtitle
content.title: Content overview
content.toolDictionaryDesc: Manage entries, readings, meanings, JLPT/BJT level, publication status, and charts.
content.toolQualityReviewDesc: Editorial review queue backed by needs_review status with audit-backed publish/archive actions.

decks.subtitle: Subtitle
decks.title: Manage study decks
decks.readOnlyNotice: Read-only. Status changes require admin.content.write permission.

flashcardDecksManagement.title: Flashcard decks
flashcardDecksManagement.subtitle: Decks (preset & user) — review, publish, archive. Including user-created decks.
flashcardDecksManagement.confirm_draft: Confirm reverting this deck to draft?

flashcardStylesManagement.title: Flashcard Styles
flashcardStylesManagement.desc: Manage visual card styles (free / premium / exclusive tiers)

users.subtitle: Manage learner profiles via the `profile` schema, including language, goals, and display context.
users.title: Title

userManagement.subtitle: Subtitle
userManagement.title: Manage users
userManagement.user360Subtitle: Search user details by ID or email. Access reason must be logged.
userManagement.user360AccessReasonHint: Min 3 chars. Reason is recorded in audit log.
userManagement.user360ReasonRequired: Please enter an access reason (min 3 chars).
userManagement.user360NotFound: No user found with this ID.
userManagement.user360SearchHint: Enter a user ID to open detailed profile. Access reason is required before loading personal data and is valid for 30 minutes per learner.
userManagement.user360AccessReasonModalDesc: You are about to view detailed personal data for user ID {{id}}. Enter a reason category and brief description (ticket number or investigation reference). All views are audited.
userManagement.user360AccessReasonExpired: Access has expired (30 min). Please re-enter reason.

audit.subtitle: Subtitle
audit.title: Admin audit log
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by action, target ID, or reason…

analytics.kpiDescription: Aggregated from metric tables, event logs, and content status.
analytics.subtitle: Subtitle
analytics.title: Executive analytics
analytics.kpiMau: Number of distinct users with flashcard reviews in the last 30 days.
analytics.kpiNew: Number of `user_profile` accounts created in the period (locale/plan filter if selected).
analytics.kpiWau: Number of distinct users with flashcard reviews in the last 7 rolling days.

iam.subtitle: Admin actor, role and permission data read from `authz` schema.
iam.title: Admin RBAC

roleManagement.title: Role management
roleManagement.subtitle: Admin role list: search, view detailed permissions, assigned admins, and related RBAC audit. Create/edit/assign actions are implemented in the next IAM Mutations slice.
roleManagement.detailSelectHint: Select a role to view permissions, assigned admins, and related RBAC audit.
roleManagement.adminEmpty: No admin holds this role yet.
roleManagement.readOnlyNotice: Read-only. Create/edit role and permission assignment will land in the next IAM Mutations slice (requires `iam.manage` and audit reason).

adminManagement.title: Admin actor management
adminManagement.subtitle: Admin list: search, filter by role/status, assign or revoke roles, enable/disable accounts. Every mutation requires a reason and is audited.
adminManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search by display name or email…
adminManagement.detailSelectHint: Select an admin to view roles, permissions, and recent audit.
adminManagement.detailNoRoles: This admin has no roles assigned.
adminManagement.reasonRequired: ↑ Please enter a reason (≥3 chars) above before assigning.
adminManagement.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Add content review for T1 on-call rotation
adminManagement.confirmRevokeMessage: You are about to revoke role {role} from {name}. This will be audited with the reason.
adminManagement.confirmStatusDisableMessage: Disable admin access for {name}? They will not be able to log in until re-enabled.
adminManagement.errorMutation: Action failed. Please check the reason and try again.
adminManagement.errorPermission: You do not have `iam.manage` to perform this action.
adminManagement.readOnlyNotice: You only have `viewer.audit`: you can view but not mutate. `iam.manage` is required to assign/revoke roles or change status.
adminManagement.keycloakMasked: (Keycloak ID is partially masked for privacy)

permissionCatalog.title: Permission catalog
permissionCatalog.subtitle: Catalog of admin RBAC permissions: search, filter by group, and inspect the roles that grant each permission together with the admins that inherit it via role. Read-only — the catalog is defined in code (`ADMIN_PERMISSION` / `ADMIN_SYSTEM_ROLE_PERMISSION_MATRIX`).
permissionCatalog.readOnlyNotice: Read-only. The permission catalog is defined in code; assignments are managed on the Roles and Admins pages.
permissionCatalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by permission code or description…
permissionCatalog.detailAdmins: Admins inheriting this permission via role
permissionCatalog.detailNoRoles: No roles grant this permission yet.
permissionCatalog.detailNoAdmins: No admins currently inherit this permission.
permissionCatalog.detailAdminsTruncated: Showing first 100 admins. There are more — filter by role on the Admins page to see all.

roleAudit.title: RBAC role audit
roleAudit.subtitle: Timeline of RBAC changes: role assigns/revokes, admin status changes, role/permission edits. Filter by actor, target, action, and date range. Audit log is append-only.
roleAudit.readOnlyNotice: Read-only — audit entries are recorded automatically by IAM mutations.
roleAudit.searchPlaceholder: Search in reason or target type…
roleAudit.empty: No audit events match the filters.

monetizationConsole.title: Monetization operations
monetizationConsole.refundDesc: Manage subscription cancellations and refunds. Select a subscription → change status or cancel at period end.

battleConfigs.title: Battle Configs
battleConfigs.subtitle: Create and manage battle modes (level, question pool, bot difficulty, scoring rules, schedule). All changes are audited with a required reason.
battleConfigs.readOnlyNotice: You only have `viewer.audit`: read & audit access. Mutations require `battle.manage`.
battleConfigs.empty: No battle configs match the current filters.
battleConfigs.emptyHint: Create a new config or reset filters.
battleConfigs.detailSelectHint: Select a config to view detail, edit, or change lifecycle.
battleConfigs.createSubtitle: New configs default to draft; publish after review.
battleConfigs.formErrName: Name must be at least 2 characters.
battleConfigs.formErrTime: Time per question must be 10–120 seconds.
battleConfigs.formErrBotDifficulties: Pick at least one bot difficulty.
battleConfigs.formErrScheduleEnd: Schedule end must be after schedule start.
battleConfigs.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Adding BJT N3 mode for morning shift
battleConfigs.confirm_publish_message: Publish config "{name}"? Players will see this mode.
battleConfigs.confirm_archive_message: Archive config "{name}"? It will no longer be visible to players.
battleConfigs.confirm_delete_message: Delete draft "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
battleConfigs.errorMutation: Operation failed. Check inputs/reason and try again.

battleMatches.title: Battle Matches
battleMatches.subtitle: Monitor and intervene on live battle sessions — abort or rerun with audited reasons.
battleMatches.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode. battle.manage permission is required to abort or rerun.
battleMatches.searchPlaceholder: Search by room or bot key…
battleMatches.emptyHint: Try adjusting filters or date range.
battleMatches.detailSelectHint: Select a match to view detail and audit history.
battleMatches.detailAuditEmpty: No audit entries for this match.
battleMatches.reasonHint: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
battleMatches.confirm_abort_message: Match will be marked abandoned and cannot be restored.
battleMatches.confirm_rerun_message: A new session will be created for the same players with current config.

battleLeaderboard.title: Battle Leaderboard
battleLeaderboard.subtitle: Time-window leaderboards. Season management coming soon.
battleLeaderboard.seasonsPendingNotice: Season management (BattleSeason) is partial_schema_pending — leaderboard currently uses all/30d/90d windows.
battleLeaderboard.emptyHint: At least one completed match is required in the selected window.

companionSettings.title: Companion Bot
companionSettings.subtitle: Manage the companion bot (Shiba) — Rive asset, tips, behavior.
companionSettings.validationRequired: Japanese and Vietnamese content are required.

battleBots.title: Bot Profiles
battleBots.subtitle: Manage battle bot opponents — difficulty, accuracy, delay, lifecycle.
battleBots.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode. battle.manage permission is required to edit bots.
battleBots.emptyHint: Create a new bot to use in battle.
battleBots.detailSelectHint: Select a bot to view detail and audit.
battleBots.detailAuditEmpty: No audit entries for this bot.
battleBots.formErrBotKey: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens; start with a letter or number.
battleBots.formErrName: Name must be at least 2 characters.
battleBots.formErrDelayOrder: Max delay must be ≥ min delay.
battleBots.formErrRive: Rive artboard and state machine are required.
battleBots.formErrJson: Provenance must be a JSON object.
battleBots.reasonHint: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
battleBots.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. tuning difficulty, disabling due to bug…
battleBots.confirm_enable_message: Bot {name} will be available for matchmaking.
battleBots.confirm_disable_message: Bot {name} will be temporarily excluded from matchmaking.
battleBots.confirm_archive_message: Bot {name} will be hidden from matchmaking but data is retained.
battleBots.confirm_delete_message: Bot {name} will be removed. This cannot be undone.

battleAbuse.title: Battle Abuse Reports
battleAbuse.subtitle: Moderation queue for cheating and misconduct reports in battle.
battleAbuse.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode. battle.manage permission is required to act.
battleAbuse.moderatePermNotice: Moderation permission: using battle.manage (includes moderation). Dedicated battle.moderate will be added in a future IAM update.
battleAbuse.emptyHint: Queue is clean — no reports match current filters.
battleAbuse.detailSelectHint: Select a report to view detail, history and resolve.
battleAbuse.detailAuditEmpty: No audit entries for this report.
battleAbuse.priorEmpty: No prior reports against this subject.
battleAbuse.notesHint: Notes must be at least 3 characters.
battleAbuse.reasonHint: Reason must be at least 3 characters.
battleAbuse.confirm_resolve_message: Choose action and enter resolution notes. The action will be audited.
battleAbuse.confirm_escalate_message: Report will be forwarded to senior moderators.

analyticsCommon.exportPrompt: Reason for CSV export (≥3 chars, audited):

analyticsBattle.title: Battle Analytics
analyticsBattle.description: Per-match KPIs and trends: bot ratio, average duration, abuse, real players.

analyticsBattle.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by mode, status, or user.

analyticsBjt.title: BJT Analytics

analyticsBjt.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by test or by skill tag (section).

analyticsFlashcards.title: Flashcard Analytics
analyticsFlashcards.description: SRS health: reviews, retention, mastery, lapses.
analyticsFlashcards.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by deck or by rating Again/Hard/Good/Easy.

analyticsGrowth.title: Growth Analytics
analyticsGrowth.description: Acquisition and conversion: signups, activation, paid, referrals, shares.
analyticsGrowth.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by campaign, referral kind, share kind.

analyticsLearning.title: Learning Analytics
analyticsLearning.description: SRS learning health: reviews, active studiers, retention, due, leech.
analyticsLearning.chartDescription: Daily SRS reviews in selected window.
analyticsLearning.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by studier, card state, or rating.

analyticsContent.title: Content Analytics
analyticsContent.description: Catalogue health: active items, lexeme, kanji, grammar, card links.
analyticsContent.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by top cards, content type, or lexeme status.

analyticsSearch.title: Search Analytics
analyticsSearch.description: Search health: queries, zero-result rate, click-through, top queries.
analyticsSearch.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by top queries, zero-result queries, or by source.

analyticsSystem.title: System Analytics
analyticsSystem.description: Pipeline health: raw events, rollup runs, error rate, DLQ, rollup lag.
analyticsSystem.breakdownDescription: Drill-down by recent runs, event source, or rollup status.

learningPaths.title: Learning Paths
learningPaths.subtitle: Manage BJT/JLPT learning paths (slug, description, publication status).

dailyItems.configsDescription: Enable/disable widgets on the Daily Hub page.
dailyItems.configsEmptyHint: The system will auto-create configs when data is available.

flashcardDecks.title: Generated Decks
flashcardDecks.subtitle: Decks (preset & user) — name, status, card count.

contentVersions.title: Title
contentVersions.subtitle: Manage content versions — browse history, compare, revert.

i18nCenter.title: i18n Center
i18nCenter.subtitle: Manage translation keys — namespace, key, translation count.

quizSessions.title: Quiz Sessions
quizSessions.subtitle: Manage quiz sessions — abort fraud sessions, extend time per support process.

mockExams.title: Title
mockExams.subtitle: Manage BJT exams: practice (mock) and official exams. Auto-timing and auto-grading system.

growthSocial.title: Social Sharing
growthSocial.subtitle: Manage share templates and moderate user-generated share events.

growthReferrals.title: Referral
growthReferrals.subtitle: Manage user referral codes and detect spam behavior.

growthPostcards.title: Postcard Templates
growthPostcards.subtitle: Manage template postcard cho streak, level up, BJT pass, battle win.

overviewDashboard.ac_empty: No urgent tasks. The system looks stable.
overviewDashboard.deltaNA: Not enough data to compare periods
overviewDashboard.ins_empty: Not enough data to surface insights yet.
overviewDashboard.kpi_contentHelp: Total lexemes, kanji, grammar, examples in active status.
overviewDashboard.kpi_searchHelp: Total content.search_events metric in the time range.

opsDeadLetters.title: Dead-letter queue (DLQ)
opsDeadLetters.subtitle: Manage failed jobs pushed to the DLQ. Retry, discard, or apply bulk actions. Every action is audited.
opsDeadLetters.discardWarning: Discard marks the entry skipped and prevents auto-retry. Reason required.

opsSecurity.title: Security events
opsSecurity.subtitle: Security event timeline derived from admin audit log: failed logins, permission denied, suspicious requests, rate-limit exceeded, privilege escalation attempts. Mark as resolved or false-positive.

opsFeatureFlags.title: Feature flags
opsFeatureFlags.subtitle: Toggle features. High-risk flags (auth/billing/monetization/security/rate-limit/kill-switch) require typing the `key` to confirm. All changes audited + history-tracked.
opsFeatureFlags.highRiskNotice: High-risk flag: type the exact `key` in the confirmation field.

opsKillSwitches.title: Kill switches (emergency disable)
opsKillSwitches.subtitle: Emergency kill switches for high-risk modules (payments, social share, upload, AI enrichment, realtime battle…). Toggling requires the exact switch name + reason.
opsKillSwitches.danger: WARNING: Kill switches disable entire modules. Confirm the blast radius before enabling.
opsKillSwitches.blastRadiusUnknown: Blast radius not declared. Treat as system-wide impact.
opsKillSwitches.typedConfirmLabel: Type the switch name exactly to confirm

opsNotifications.title: Broadcast notifications
opsNotifications.subtitle: Compose, schedule and send broadcast notifications (push / email / in-app). Audience filters: locale / plan / level / country / explicit user list. Note: persisted via audit-log temporarily (partial_schema_pending); a real provider pipeline lands in a follow-up phase.
opsNotifications.partialSchemaNotice: partial_schema_pending: dedicated BroadcastNotification model + delivery pipeline land in a later phase.

flashcardTemplatesManagement.title: Flashcard variants
flashcardTemplatesManagement.subtitle: All flashcard variants: edit front/back/reading, publish, archive, and manage example source links.
flashcardTemplatesManagement.sourceNoCandidates: No canonical source matched this front text.
flashcardTemplatesManagement.examplesEmpty: This source has no examples or no canonical source is linked.
flashcardTemplatesManagement.storedSourceNeedsRemap: This variant uses a non-canonical source; learners will use front-text fallback until it is linked.

dailyRadarAdmin.cardEditorHint: Content shown in learner carousel and spotlight.
dailyRadarAdmin.moduleEditorHint: Module route, category, status and visual theme.

supportNotesAdmin.title: Support notes
supportNotesAdmin.subtitle: Operator notes attached to a user. Three privacy levels: private (author only), team (all support), audit_only (compliance only). Every read+write audited.
supportNotesAdmin.privacyNotice: Privacy: `private` visible only to the author; `team` visible to all support; `audit_only` visible only to compliance / iam.manage.
supportNotesAdmin.auditScopeNotice: Compliance / audit_only mode — all notes including others' private notes are visible.

supportNotes.description: Support notes added by admins. Stored in audit log.

privacyAdmin.allDescription: All user privacy requests (data export and account deletion).
privacyAdmin.exportDescription: Data export and account deletion requests.

flashcardDecks.subtitle: Decks (preset & user) — name, status, card count.

quizTemplates.subtitle: BJT mock test templates — name, status, sections.

quizSessions.title: Quiz Sessions
quizSessions.subtitle: Quiz sessions — user, test, score, band, status.

mockExams.title: Mock Exams
mockExams.subtitle: BJT mock tests — name, status, sections.

remediation.title: Remediation Links
remediation.subtitle: Remediation links (question → flashcard) — advanced feature.
remediation.plannedNotice: Remediation link management requires a dedicated UI. Currently, remediation is managed via the Question Bank (remediationCardId).

growthSocial.title: Social Sharing
growthSocial.subtitle: User-created share items — type, token, created at.

growthReferrals.title: Referral Codes
growthReferrals.subtitle: Referral codes — user, code, created at.

growthCampaigns.title: Ad Campaigns
growthCampaigns.subtitle: Ad campaigns — name, status, start date.

settingsAdmin.description: System feature flags and settings. Detailed management on the Feature Flags / Kill Switches page.

settingsManagement.title: System Settings
settingsManagement.subtitle: Feature flags and global settings. High-risk keys require confirmation.
settingsManagement.confirmationHint: Type the key `{key}` exactly to confirm.
settingsManagement.confirmationRequired: Backend requires confirmation for high-risk flag changes.
settingsManagement.highRiskWarningBody: This flag covers monetization/auth/billing/security/rate-limit or is a kill switch. Exact key confirmation required.
settingsManagement.rulesMustBeObject: Rules must be a JSON object.

privacyDataRequests.title: Privacy Requests (Personal Data)
privacyDataRequests.subtitle: Manage GDPR/PDPA data requests (access/rectification/erasure/portability). All operations are audited and require a reason.
privacyDataRequests.typeIdToConfirm: Type the request ID exactly to confirm full erasure
privacyDataRequests.erasureWarning: Warning: this action cannot be undone. User records will be anonymized/deleted per retention policy. You must type the ID correctly to proceed.

legalPolicyAdmin.title: Legal Documents
legalPolicyAdmin.subtitle: Version management for Terms / Privacy / Cookies / Tokushoho. Only drafts are editable. Published/archived versions cannot be edited — create a new version.

legalCookiesAdmin.subtitle: Manage cookie policy and tracker categories displayed in consent banner.
legalCookiesAdmin.partialNotice: partial_schema_pending: Tracker categories are code-managed. Will become CRUD after `cookie_category` table is added.

legalRetentionAdmin.title: Data Retention Policy
legalRetentionAdmin.subtitle: Data retention periods by domain. Changes require code migration and operational schedule adjustments.
legalRetentionAdmin.partialNotice: Retention policy is defined in code. Period changes require code migration and operator schedules. Dynamic management table planned after legal review.

tokushohoAdmin.subtitle: Display based on Japan's Specified Commercial Transactions Act. Fields marked * are required before publishing. Compliant with Consumer Affairs Agency guidelines.
tokushohoAdmin.missingRequiredPublishWarning: Required fields are missing. Please fill in all fields before publishing.

exercisesAdmin.title: Interactive Exercises Admin
exercisesAdmin.subtitle: Configure exercise types, placement, and display order.

gamificationAdmin.subtitle: Configure streaks, achievements, leaderboards, and pets.
gamificationAdmin.name: Name
gamificationAdmin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
gamificationAdmin.petResetOk: Pet has been reset to egg.

cardgenAdmin.title: Auto Card Generation Admin
cardgenAdmin.subtitle: Auto flashcard generation rules and job history.

magazine.title: Magazine Management
magazine.subtitle: Daily Magazine content — auto-generated by AI, manual override when needed.
magazine.empty: No articles yet. Click 'Generate' to create.
magazine.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this article?
magazine.generateDescription: Choose content type and date to generate a new article via AI.
magazine.generateExists: Article already exists for this date and type.
magazine.guideAuto: Content is auto-generated by AI daily at 5:30 AM (vocab, weather, horoscope, bjt_phrase) and Mon+Thu at 17:00 (loto).
magazine.guideManual: Admin can manually generate for any date/type, or regenerate if quality is unsatisfactory.
magazine.guideApi: Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in env for real AI generation. Without key → mock data.
magazine.guideSource: Weather sourced from JMA (気象庁). Loto uses statistical mock (Phase 2: real API).
magazine.guideIdempotent: Generation is idempotent — same date/type won't create duplicates. Use 'Regenerate' to overwrite.
